title: WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd:
WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd!
